t_en: ...Alright. I guess we'll just have to trust you... for now.

t_ch: 理解万岁！那么，恕我先失陪了——祝你们顺利取得下一枚资格徽章，也希望我能在最后的锦标赛中一睹二位的英姿！
t_en: I'm glad to hear it. With that said, please forgive my departure — I hope to catch a glimpse of your remarkable skills in the championship!

t_ch: 哼哼…哼？哼哼？
t_en: Oink... Oink! Oink?

t_en: And there he goes again... I just wonder how much of what he says is true.

t_ch: 喂，刚才那个面具男已经走了吧？
t_en: That mask-guy, he's gone now, right?

t_ch: 嗯，已经走了…欸？是谁？

t_ch: 哼哼？哼哼哼？
t_en: Oink? Oink, oink?

t_ch: 果然，有游戏的地方就有你。
t_en: Where there's a game, there's Silver Wolf.

t_ch: 你还挺懂我的嘛。没准我们会有不少共同语言呢。
t_en: You've got me pretty figured out. Who knows, we might just have more in common than you expect.

t_ch: 你是来找黑塔自首的？
t_en: Have you come to surrender yourself to Herta?

t_ch: …别提了。上次交过手之后，她应该已经满意了。
t_en: ...Please don't bring her up. I'm sure she's pretty pleased with herself after our last encounter.

t_ch: …你确定不是来搞破坏的？啊，星核猎手不会还在打{NICKNAME}的主意吧？
t_en: ...So you're not here to start trouble? You're not still after {NICKNAME}, right?

t_ch: 真是的…一定要我留个口供才行么？我只是以玩家的身份出现在这里而已。
t_en: Seriously... do I really have to make a formal statement or something? I'm here for the game, nothing more.

t_ch: 毕竟…谁知道那个面具男在打什么主意呢？
t_en: Honestly, though... I wonder what that mask-guy is up to?

t_ch: 你怕乔瓦尼了？
t_en: Are you afraid of Giovanni?

t_ch: 怎么可能，但这人的心思很难猜透——万一他是想钓鱼执法，把我丢给公司、看我出洋相呢？
t_en: Of course not... but it's hard to tell what he's thinking. What if he's trying to set a trap to lure me into the IPC's hands and watch me make a fool of myself?

t_ch: 难道他真的有阴谋？
t_en: So you too think he could be up to something too?

t_ch: 嗐，谁知道呢——指不定是想钓鱼执法，把我丢给公司、看我出洋相。
t_en: Eh, who knows? He could be trying to lure me into the IPC's hands, just so he can watch me make a fool of myself.

t_ch: 毕竟…你永远不知道{RUBY_B#「欢愉」的追随者}假面愚者{RUBY_E#}会为了看乐子搞出什么花样。
t_en: I mean... you never know what kind of crazy stunt a {RUBY_B#Follower of the Elation}Masked Fool{RUBY_E#} might pull for the sake of having "fun."

t_ch: 乔瓦尼先生果然是假面愚者的一员吗？怪不得……
t_en: So Mr. Giovanni really is a member of the Masked Fools? No wonder...

t_ch: 哼哼！哼？！
t_en: Oink, oink! Oink?

t_ch: 难怪戴着面具…
t_en: So that's why he's wearing a mask...

t_ch: 记着，跟戴面具的人打交道一定要留个心眼。
t_en: Look, when you're dealing with someone wearing a mask, you gotta keep your wits about you. Common sense.

t_ch: 这下他肯定是个坏东西了！
t_en: No question about it, he's definitely up to no good!

t_ch: 那倒未必——但我必须提醒你，跟假面愚者打交道一定要留个心眼。
t_en: Not necessarily, but when you're dealing with someone wearing a mask, you gotta keep your wits about you. Common sense.

t_ch: 听起来…你很了解他？
t_en: Hmm... sounds like you know a lot about him?

t_ch: 他可能是全宇宙最招摇的假面愚者了——谁没听说过艾普瑟隆的假面富商？说不了解我才觉得奇怪呢。
t_en: Who hasn't heard about the Masked Tycoon of Epsilon? He's probably the flashiest Masked Fool in the universe — it'd be weird if I hadn't heard of him.

t_ch: 不过我对他不感兴趣，懒得挖他资料。
t_en: Anyway, he doesn't interest me in the slightest. I'm not gonna waste my precious time digging up info on him.

t_ch: 喂——喂喂——
t_en: Hello? Hello, hello?

t_ch: 咦，这是广播吗？
t_en: Huh? Is this a broadcast?

t_ch: 星核小鬼——粉毛的小矮子——
t_en: You there, Stellaron twerp and little miss pink...

t_ch: 你们磨蹭什么呢——还玩不玩游戏了——我赶着做研究啊——！
t_en: What's the hold up? I have some serious research I could be doing right now. Are you gonna play or not?

t_ch: 粉毛的小矮子…不会是在说我吧？！
t_en: Little miss pink... What's that supposed to mean!?

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 而且她为什么不点你的名啊？什么区别对待！
t_en: Seriously? And what about you? She just intentionally ignored you!? Hmph!

t_ch: 我对他们的监控终端后台做了些小小的调整——我以全息投影出现在这里的话，他们通过监控画面是看不到我的。
t_en: I made a few sneaky modifications to her surveillance terminal. Whenever I show up here as a hologram, she won't be able to see me on the camera feed. Cool, right?

t_ch: …好方便的能力。
t_en: ...Pretty convenient.

t_ch: 黑塔女士——
t_en: Madam Herta—

t_ch: 我们马上到——
t_en: We'll be right there—

t_ch: 别急——我还没——说谜题——！
t_en: Relax! I haven't told you what you've got to do yet!

t_ch: 要想挑战我——你们必须——在<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>中找到<color=#dbc291ff>呜呜伯藏起来的所有凭证</color>——
t_en: If you want to challenge me, you'll need to find all of the <color=#dbc291ff>passes hidden by the Wubbaboos</color> on the <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Maps</color> first.

t_ch: 明白了吗——！
t_en: Got that?

t_ch: 明白了——！
t_en: Got it!

t_ch: 怎么找——？！
t_en: How do we find them!?

t_ch: 你们需要找到空间站的<color=#dbc291ff>服务机器人</color>，领取对应的<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>——！
t_en: You need to locate the <color=#dbc291ff>service robots</color> on the space station, and take corresponding <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Maps</color> from them!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>在藏宝图中找到对应凭证所在，然后实地找到三重凭证</color>——这就是全部的玩法——！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Track down all three passes on the maps</color> — achieving this means you've completed the puzzle!

t_ch: 哼，就这？竞技协会就不能整点有难度的障碍吗？
t_en: Hmph, is that it? Can't the Gaming Association come up with any real challenges?

t_ch: 看来时间还多的是呢。那我就先去刷刷经验练练级好了——二位，慢走不送。
t_en: Looks like I've got plenty of time. Guess I'll go grind some levels for a bit. See ya, wouldn't wanna be ya.

t_ch: …这就走了？动作可真快呀。
t_en: ...She left, just like that?

t_ch: 那，我们也出发吧——就按黑塔说的做！
t_en: Alright, let's get moving. We should follow Herta's instructions.

t_ch: 哼——哼哼！
t_en: Oink — oink, oink!

t_ch: 服务机器人
t_en: Service Robot

t_ch: 呜呜伯
t_en: Wubbaboo

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>从小机器人的后侧缝隙中被打印了出来。
t_en: The <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Map</color> was printed out from the slit on the back of the Little Robot.

t_ch: 哼，是星核小鬼和粉毛小矮子啊。怎么样，享受竞技协会布置给我和你们的愚蠢谜题吗？
t_en: Well, well, well, little miss pink and the twerp. Having fun tackling the ridiculous puzzles the Gaming Association cooked up?

t_ch: …你说谁粉毛小矮子呢！
t_en: ...Who're you calling little miss pink!?

t_ch: 你啊，还能是谁？艾丝妲又不在这里。
t_en: You, of course, it's not like Asta's here.

t_ch: 行了行了，搞快点。要搞那个什么——对决，是吧？
t_en: Alright, alright, hurry it up. We're here for that — what's it called again — duel, right?

t_ch: 或者我直接把那资格徽章给你得了？你选吧。
t_en: Or I can just give you the Mastery Mark, up to you.

t_ch: 还是走正规流程对决吧。
t_en: We'd better follow the proper rules of the tournament.

t_ch: 那你直接给我吧。
t_en: I'll take it off your hands for you.

t_ch: 真能这么做吗？
t_en: Wait, seriously? Can we do that?

t_ch: 行啊，没问题…呃，等会儿，我接个电话。
t_en: Sure, no problem... Ugh, wait, I need to take this call.

t_ch: 嗯…嗯嗯…好的……
t_en: Mm-hmm... Mm-hmm... Alright...

t_ch: 竞技协会的人来电了，他们说让我走正规流程。
t_en: That was the Gaming Association — turns out they're making me stick to the rules.

t_ch: 哼哼…哼哼！
t_en: Oink, oink... Oink, oink!

t_ch: 嘁，真麻烦。要不是非得给公司面子……
t_en: Ugh, so annoying. The IPC's too concerned with its own reputation...

t_ch: 好了，放马过来吧——你们一起上，我赶时间。
t_en: Fine, let's get this over with. Bring it on, I'm in a hurry.

t_ch: 啊，我输啦，这枚资格徽章就交给你们吧。
t_en: Oops, well, looks like I lost. Here, the Mastery Mark is yours.
Oink...

t_ch: 愣着干什么？你们要的不就是这个吗？
t_en: What? Isn't this what you wanted?

t_ch: 好没有仪式感…
t_en: Feels kinda underwhelming...

t_ch: 是啊…好没有仪式感……
t_en: Yeah... feels like we're missing something...

t_ch: 仪式感？那种东西能吃吗？还是说有助于解开你体内的星核之谜？
t_en: Missing something? Did you expect me to remove the twerp's Stellaron, too?

t_ch: 很显然——两者成立的可能性都为零。
t_en: You can't always have your cake and eat it, too, you know.

t_ch: 好了，事情搞定了就快走吧。难道还指望我给你们泡壶热茶，再开个茶话会不成？
t_en: Alright, let's wrap things up and get going. Next you'll be asking for a tea party...

t_ch: 算了——一人一个问题，不许多问，问完赶紧走人哈。
t_en: *sigh* Fine, since you're here, I'll throw in a Q&A. One question per person, and make it snappy!

t_ch: 你为什么会成为冠军候补？
t_en: Why did you become a championship contender?

t_ch: 你知道乔瓦尼的底细吗？
t_en: Do you have any intel on Giovanni?

t_ch: 不清楚。除了这场无聊的庆典，我和那个男人没有任何业务来往。
t_en: Nope. Apart from this boring festival, I have no dealings with the man.

t_ch: 啊，我还想问个问题——黑塔女士为什么会成为冠军候补呀？
t_en: I was wondering, Madam Herta, why did you become a championship contender?

t_ch: 那我想喝红的。
t_en: Can we have a tea party?

t_ch: 呃，你怎么还蹬鼻子上脸了……
t_en: Ugh, do trailblazers not understand sarcasm?

t_ch: 话说回来，我倒是好奇一件事——黑塔女士为什么会成为冠军候补呀？
t_en: I was wondering, Madam Herta, why did you become a championship contender?

t_ch: 还能因为什么？给星际和平公司面子呗。
t_en: To bolster the IPC's reputation — it's a win-win for me.

t_ch: 好了，闲话就到此为止吧。我还有事，真的……
t_en: Alright, that's enough small talk. I've got things to do, seriously...

t_ch: 哼哼！哼哼哼，哼！
t_en: Oink! Grunt! Oink, oink!

t_ch: …一人一个问题，这个小家伙可不包括在内。
t_en: One question per person, remember? The little one doesn't count.

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#54}好像感知到了什么危险…能让我再问最后一个问题吗，黑塔女士？
t_en: Seems like {TEXTJOIN#54} can sense some kind of danger... One last question, please?

t_ch: 唉…你问吧。
t_en: ...Go on then.

t_ch: 这只次元扑满——准确地说是以太灵——在性格方面似乎有些不对劲。你有什么头绪吗？
t_en: This Warp Trotter — I mean — Aether Spirit... they've been acting a little strange. Do you have any idea what the reason could be?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 好吧，就连天才俱乐部的人都没头绪…{TEXTJOIN#54}到底为什么会变成这样呢？
t_en: ...Not even the Genius Society can figure it out. Why did {TEXTJOIN#54} end up this way?

t_ch: 哈，对了。
t_en: Oh, hang on.

t_ch: 您有头绪了吗！
t_en: Did you remember something!?

t_ch: 没有，但我想起来乔瓦尼要我给你们带个话：
t_en: Nope, but you just reminded me, Giovanni wanted me to pass on a message to you both:

t_ch: 「那位高手玩家已经提前击败了上届庆典的冠军首席，并破格赢得了本届冠军首席的称号。因此，本届庆典将产生两名冠军首席。」
t_en: "The elite player has already bested last year's champion, and claimed this year's title. Hence, this year's event will crown two champions."

t_ch: 就这些，没了。你们快走吧。
t_en: That's all he had to say. Now, you'd better get a move on.

t_ch: 呃…他说这些干什么？
t_en: Uh... Why would he say that?

t_ch: 哼哼？哼！
t_en: Oink, oink? Oink!

t_ch: 大不了就是提醒你们加快点进度呗，或者是在挑衅你们——以他的性格，所谓的「高手玩家」指的说不定就是他自己呢。
t_en: Maybe he's just trying to get you two to move faster, or he just wants to provoke you... Given his nature, this "elite player" might even be him.

t_ch: 好像是有这种可能。
t_en: That sounds plausible.

t_ch: 感觉…确实是假面愚者会做的事情。
t_en: I mean, it does sound like something a Masked Fool might do...

t_ch: 应该不是吧。
t_en: I doubt it.

t_ch: 可那位星核猎手姑娘说过，他其实是假面愚者吧？感觉这倒确实是他会做的事……
t_en: Really? The Stellaron Hunter girl did say he was a Masked Fool... and it seems like a stunt they'd pull...

t_ch: 可恶的假面愚者…
t_en: Classic Masked Fool move...

t_ch: 可恶…感觉被乔瓦尼先生彻底拿捏了！
t_en: Ugh... It feels like Mr. Giovanni has been stringing us along the whole time!

t_ch: 有问题问他去，我可不负责。
t_en: Then you'd better ask him about it. It's got nothing to do with me.

t_ch: 好吧…多谢黑塔女士。
t_en: Okay... Thanks Madam Herta.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，既然我们拿到资格徽章了，就回列车休息吧……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, since we've got the Mastery Mark, let's head back to the Express and get some well-earned rest.

t_ch: …咦，你的手机是不是响了？
t_en: Uh... Is that your phone?

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！
t_en: Oink, oink, oink!

t_ch: 咦，又是维尔德嘛？他刚才是不是提到了「托帕后援团」和{TEXTJOIN#54}？
t_en: Huh? Wilder? Didn't he mention something about Topaz's Support Squad and the Aether Spirit?

t_ch: 哼哼？哼？
t_en: Oink, oink?

t_ch: 似乎是这样。
t_en: I think so.

t_ch: 他可能掌握了某些情报。
t_en: Maybe he has some new intel.

t_ch: 那我们去找他吧。又要回贝洛伯格了……
t_en: Well, we'd better go find him then. Back to Belobog it is...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，三月七小姐！感谢你们应邀前来。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, Miss March! Thank you both for coming.

t_ch: 没什么啦，顺路的事而已。你想找我们聊什么？
t_en: No problem, we were in the area anyway. What did you want to discuss with us?

t_ch: 托帕总监派我来跟进解决「托帕后援团」和那只以太灵产生的系列问题。
t_en: Director Topaz sent me to handle the "Topaz's Support Squad situation" and the problems caused by the Aether Spirit.

t_ch: 后来听说，那只以太灵现在似乎就在两位手里…所以我才想到找你们聊聊。
t_en: I've been told that the Aether Spirit is with you... so, I thought it'd be good to have a chat with you about them.

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#54}确实和我们在一起。
t_en: That's right, {TEXTJOIN#54} is with us.

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#54}？哦，是你们给它起的名字？
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#54}? Oh, is that the name you picked for them?

t_ch: 看来你们已经相当亲密了…但还请两位能耐着性子，听完我和托帕总监的请求。
t_en: It appears you've grown quite attached to them... but I'd really appreciate it if you'd hear me out. Director Topaz has a request.

t_ch: 展开讲讲？
t_en: Care to elaborate?

t_ch: 没问题，我此行正是为了说明这个。
t_en: No problem, that's exactly why I'm here.

t_ch: 要{TEXTJOIN#54}没有，要命一条！
t_en: If you want to take {TEXTJOIN#54}, you'll have to speak with my bat first!

t_ch: 不不不，我想说的不是这个！您先听我讲……
t_en: No, no! You've got the wrong idea. Please, just let me explain...

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！
t_en: Oink, oink, oink!

t_ch: 啊，{TEXTJOIN#54}！你怎么又自己跑出来啦。
t_en: Ah! {TEXTJOIN#54}! How did you get out again?

t_ch: …果然，这就是托帕总监说的那只以太灵。
t_en: ...Ah, as I suspected, this is the Aether Spirit that Director Topaz spoke of.

t_ch: 其实，这只以太灵是「托帕后援团」擅自从空间站「黑塔」窃来的藏品——准确地说，是那位年轻站长艾丝妲的藏品之一。
t_en: It's like this... This Aether Spirit was a museum piece held on Herta Space Station, which was later snatched by Topaz's Support Squad. To be precise, they actually belong to Asta, the station's lead researcher.

t_ch: 托帕总监本来对「后援团」一事不置可否，但他们这么做无疑是给总监捅了篓子…她这才勒令「后援团」解散——但在那之前，他们必须把窃来的以太灵送还才行。
t_en: Initially, Director Topaz refrained from commenting on the support squad situation, but their actions undoubtedly created a predicament for the director. As a result, she ordered the squad to disband, but also ordered them to return the stolen Aether Spirit to its owner first.

t_ch: 结果，问题就这么出现了：你们应该也发现了，这只以太灵十分不同寻常——它有自己的脾性，跟其它制式化的数据完全不同。
t_en: And that's pretty much the whole story. I'm sure you've noticed too — this Aether Spirit is unlike the others... They have their own unique personality — a mind of their own, you could say — which makes them very distinctive.

t_ch: 正因如此，它在返回空间站之前擅自逃跑了——逃跑的同时还顺便带走了以太硬币。
t_en: It's precisely due to this fact that they escaped before they could be returned to the space station. Interestingly, they somehow managed to grab an Aether Coin during the escape.

t_ch: 那枚硬币掉在了这贝洛伯格，被下层区的那个小男孩捡到；「后援团」成员随后也找到了这条线索……
t_en: The coin wound up in Belobog and was found by a young boy from the Underworld. This clue was then subsequently uncovered by the members of the support squad...

t_ch: …两位和这只以太灵的缘分也是从这里开始的。
t_en: ...and this is where fate brought you and the Aether spirit together.

t_ch: 哼！哼……
t_en: Oink! Oink...

t_ch: 它为什么会产生性格？
t_en: Why do they have their own personality?

t_ch: 对，我也想问这个——{TEXTJOIN#54}为什么会产生自己的性格呢？
t_en: Mm, I was wondering the same thing.

t_ch: 艾丝妲也有收藏的习惯？
t_en: Asta is a collector?

t_ch: …虽然我也很好奇，但这好像不是重点。
t_en: ...Is that really the main takeaway from all this?

t_en: "You guys have caused me nothing but trouble... It's time for you to make amends by proving yourselves in the Victory Zone!"

t_en: So it was all an act...

t_ch: 打工人真不容易啊…
t_en: It's a tough life working for the IPC...

t_ch: 哈哈…这可能就是所谓的黑色幽默吧。
t_en: Haha... Sometimes you just have to laugh at the absurdity of it all.

t_ch: 谜题说明完毕。如您做好准备，请随我前往第一处<color=#dbc291ff>引爆地点</color>——
t_en: This concludes instructions. If you are ready, please follow me to the first <color=#dbc291ff>detonation location</color>.

t_ch: 啊，「向导」要走了，我们快跟上！
t_en: Hey, the guide is on the move, let's keep up!

t_ch: 在前方侦测到数个可驱散目标，正在为您调用「自动机兵•蜘蛛」操作权限——
t_en: Multiple dispersible targets detected ahead. Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

t_ch: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
t_en: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

t_ch: 注意：<color=#dbc291ff>如果从正面靠近目标，「自动机兵•蜘蛛」很可能会被目标报废</color>——所以，你们必须从<color=#dbc291ff>目标背后</color>引爆「自动机兵•蜘蛛」——
t_en: Warning: <color=#dbc291ff>If you approach the targets head on, they are highly likely to cause damage to the Automaton Spiders</color>. Thus, it is imperative that you <color=#dbc291ff>detonate the Automaton Spiders behind your targets</color>.

t_en: Multiple dispersible targets detected <color=#dbc291ff>at bottom of mine bridge</color>. Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

t_en: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

t_en: Targets detected at <color=#dbc291ff>bottom of mine bridge</color>.

t_ch: 在前方侦测到数个可驱散目标，正在为您调用「自动机兵•蜘蛛」操作权限——
t_en: Multiple dispersible targets detected ahead. Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

t_ch: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
t_en: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

t_en: Be aware: Automaton Spiders may only be used once. Trigger explosions <color=#dbc291ff>when targets are grouped closely together</color>.

t_ch: 他们人好多啊…{NICKNAME}，你可要找准时机再动手哦，看你表演啦～
t_en: Look how many there are, {NICKNAME}! Better make sure you choose the moment to strike. Don't let me down~

t_ch: 你看，{NICKNAME}，那边有两个「托帕后援团」成员把通道堵住了！
t_en: Look, {NICKNAME}, there are two workers blocking the way over there!

t_ch: 他们连头都不扭一下…这防守也太无懈可击了吧？
t_en: Look at them, standing there like statues! It might be tricky getting around these two.

t_ch: 请不要惊慌——我有办法——
t_en: Please remain calm — I have a solution.

t_ch: …真的假的？！
t_en: What!?

t_ch: 这是…矿车？
t_en: A... mine cart?

t_ch: 原来是这样！我明白了！
t_en: Aha, now I get it! That's brilliant.

t_ch: 你你你…你明白什么了？快告诉我！
t_en: Wh—What's brilliant?

t_ch: 矿车？什么意思？
t_en: A mine cart? Why?

t_ch: 是啊，矿车能用来干嘛？
t_en: What do we need a mine cart for?

t_ch: 你说话呀倒是……
t_en: Come on, say something already.

t_ch: …啊！我明白了！
t_en: ...Ohhhh! I get it!

t_ch: 看来我们想到一块去了。
t_en: Looks like we're on the same page.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，不愧是我们～
t_en: Hehe, for once!

t_ch: 你明白什么了？
t_en: Care to explain?

t_ch: 嗨呀，你还没明白嘛！来，让本姑娘告诉你——
t_en: C'mon, you still haven't figured it out?

t_ch: 你看，我们就这样把机器人装进矿车里……
t_en: Alright, it's like this. All we need to do is load the robot onto the mine cart...

t_ch: 然后，把矿车推过去——嘭！他们肯定发现不了。
t_en: ...give it a little push... and then kaboom! They'll never see it coming!

t_ch: 怎么样～是不是很完美？
t_en: What do you think? It's the perfect plan~

t_ch: 没错，没错。恭喜你们，得出了完美的解法！正在为您调用「自动机兵•蜘蛛」操作权限——
t_en: Congratulations, you are correct. This is the optimal solution! Granting operation access to Automaton Spider.

t_ch: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
t_en: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

t_ch: 就交给你啦，{NICKNAME}——炸他们个出其不意吧！
t_en: It's all up to you now, {NICKNAME}! Catch 'em by surprise!

t_ch: 操作矿车
t_en: Operate Mine Cart

t_ch: 你…你们是什么时候来到我背后的？
t_en: H—Huh? How'd you get behind me?

t_ch: 难道…你们把我的同事们都解决掉了？
t_en: Are you telling me you wiped out all my co-workers?

t_ch: 你还挺机灵。
t_en: Your powers of perception are truly astounding.

t_ch: 下一个就是你！
t_en: You're next!

t_ch: 可、可恶…既然这样，我也不和你们硬碰硬了！
t_en: Fine, if that's the case then I'm outta here... Do whatever you want!

t_ch: 好讨厌的感觉——！
t_en: Ugh! I can't believe it!

t_ch: 恭喜二位！「决胜乐园『大矿区』」的危机已经解除——现在，两位已经可以向冠军候补发起挑战了！
t_en: Congratulations! The Great Mine Victory Zone crisis has been resolved — you may now challenge the championship contender!

t_ch: 正在传送冠军候补坐标——传送完成，祝二位旗开得胜！
t_en: Transmitting championship contender coordinates... transmission complete. May your path lead to triumph!

t_ch: 看来这就是最后一战了——我们走吧，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Well, looks like this is our last stop — time to make a move, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 哈哈…我果然没有看走眼！两位确实如我所愿，一路走到这里…来到了鄙人面前！
t_en: Haha... I never doubted you two would show up sooner or later!

t_ch: 你们的热情真是太耀眼了！身为这届庆典的全权赞助人，以及这座决胜乐园的<color=#dbc291ff>冠军候补</color>，我可真是太欣慰了！
t_en: Your enthusiasm is truly unmatched! As the sponsor of this event, and this Victory Zone's <color=#dbc291ff>championship contender</color>, it brings me great joy to see you here!

t_ch: 怎么是你？
t_en: It's... you?

t_ch: 居然是乔瓦尼先生？！——虽然我先前已经有些预感了……
t_en: Mr. Giovanni! I guess it's not that surprising...

t_ch: 出乎你的意料了么？那我可真是不胜荣幸！
t_en: Not who you were expecting? I must say it's truly a privilege!

t_ch: 果然是你…
t_en: As suspected...

t_ch: 果然是乔瓦尼先生！看来我的预感确实是对的……
t_en: Mr. Giovanni? Seems like my hunch was right all along...

t_ch: 哈哈哈，真是敏锐…不愧是你！
t_en: Haha, so astute!

t_ch: 废话少说，交出徽章！
t_en: Enough talk, hand over the Mastery Mark!

t_ch: …等等等等，你就不惊讶一下嘛？！
t_en: Wait, wait, wait — you're not even a little bit surprised by this?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，我理解你为何能够走到这里了…不愧是你！
t_en: Ha, now I see why you've made it so far. Truly impressive!

t_ch: 但我明白，在我们的对决真正开始之前，两位一定有许多问题想要问我——比如，那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>究竟是谁，我和这位玩家又是什么关系……
t_en: I imagine before our final bout begins, you'd like me to answer some questions... Who is this <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color>? What exactly is my connection to them...?

t_ch: 所以，乔瓦尼先生，你可以告诉我们问题的答案吗？
t_en: Are you finally going to tell us?

t_ch: 哼哼？哼！哼？
t_en: Oink? Oink, oink?

t_ch: 啧啧啧…三月七小姐，你太心急了。
t_en: Tsk, tsk... Patience, Miss March.

t_ch: 你知道…以太战线竞技协会为什么要为锦标赛设置资格徽章作为门槛吗？
t_en: Did you ever wonder why the Aetherium Wars Gaming Association chose Mastery Marks as a requirement for progression?

t_ch: 答案其实很简单：若想要赢得<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军首席」</color>头衔，就必须向其他人展现出应有的<color=#dbc291ff>「实力」</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「决心」</color>……
t_en: The answer is actually quite simple: In order to claim the title of <color=#dbc291ff>champion</color>, one must demonstrate the necessary <color=#dbc291ff>strength</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>resolve</color> to surpass others...

t_ch: 而<color=#dbc291ff>「提问」</color>也是如此——
t_en: ...and the same principle applies to <color=#dbc291ff>asking questions</color> as well.

t_ch: 如果你们真的想要向<color=#dbc291ff>「命运」</color>发问，并且得到问题的<color=#dbc291ff>「答案」</color>，那就在对决中击败我，向我证明你们的<color=#dbc291ff>「决心」</color>吧！
t_en: If you truly wish to question <color=#dbc291ff>fate</color>, and learn the <color=#dbc291ff>answer</color>, then defeat me in a duel and show me your unwavering <color=#dbc291ff>resolve</color>!

t_ch: 精彩…真是精彩！真是酣畅淋漓的对决——我乔瓦尼•乔尔吉奥甘拜下风！
t_en: Impressive... Truly impressive! What a riveting duel! I, Giovanni di Giorgio, humbly concede!

t_ch: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
t_en: Oink! Oink! Oink!

t_ch: 真是精彩的对决。
t_en: That was an amazing duel!

t_ch: 托帕小姐说的确实没错…乔瓦尼先生果然有一手。
t_en: Phew... Miss Topaz wasn't kidding... Mr. Giovanni really knows his stuff!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，不敢当！我已经确实了解了你们的「决心」…现在是时候将「答案」如数奉上了。
t_en: Haha, you flatter me! I've witnessed your unwavering resolve. Now it's time I revealed the answer to your question.

t_ch: 现在能说说问题的答案了吗？
t_en: So, can you give us some answers now?

t_ch: 没错！这下我们应该有资格得到「答案」了吧？
t_en: Yeah... Surely we've earned it?

t_ch: 哈哈，我已经确实了解了你们的「决心」…现在是时候将「答案」如数奉上了。
t_en: I've witnessed your unwavering resolve... Now it's time I revealed the answer to your questions.

t_ch: 徽章呢？快交出来！
t_en: Hand over the Mastery Mark — chop chop!

t_ch: …哎，等下等下，你是一旦滚动起来就停不下来的石头吗？我们还有问题没问呢！
t_en: ...Hey, slow down! We still have questions that need answering!

t_ch: 哈哈，没关系！就算你们忘了，我也会将「答案」如数奉上的。
t_en: Ha, no need to worry — even if you had forgotten, I had my answers at the ready.
